div1.entryFree: Complice, confederate, ally (cf. Accomplice): which is held by Bushy, Bagot and their --s, R2 II, 3, 165. to fight with Glendower and his --s, III, 1, 43. the lives of all your loving --s lean on your health, H4B I, 1, 163. to quell the rebels and their --s, H6B V, 1, 212. in despite of thee thyself and all thy --s, H6C IV, 3, 44.
